ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officeholders" (
  "officeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the officeholder */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held by the officeholder */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officeholder started their tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the officeholder ended their tenure */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Length of the officeholder's term */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or significant events related to the officeholder's tenure */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the officeholder */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the officeholder */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the officeholder */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photograph of the officeholder */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background and degrees */,
  "previous_employment" TEXT /* Previous employment history before joining the museum */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or honors received */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (for living officeholders or their descendants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officeholders_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the museum */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "hierarchy_level" TEXT /* Hierarchical level of the position */,
  "supervisor_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_supervisor_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "officeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officeholder associated with the document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., report, letter, image) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_officeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("officeholder_id") REFERENCES officeholders ("officeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "officeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officeholder associated with the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* The impact or significance of the event */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to any media related to the event */,
  "sources" TEXT /* References or sources for the event description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_officeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("officeholder_id") REFERENCES officeholders ("officeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "officeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officeholder record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_officeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("officeholder_id") REFERENCES officeholders ("officeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "officeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officeholder record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value after the change */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* A list of fields that were changed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_officeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("officeholder_id") REFERENCES officeholders ("officeholder_id")
)
